title: Lead SEO Specialist at Pilgrim International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Pilgrim International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim International Enterprises! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim International Enterprises:
Pilgrim International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim International Enterprises!
